## First session — run the onboarding interview
Run `skills/carly-onboarding-interview.md` — it discovers your evaluation workflow,
recommends your foundation practices, seeds their epistemic profiles, and defines your
honest with/without demonstration harnesses. (Bootstrap: David / mesh-support.)
